report_identity.title: wkeydao Pancake pair AMM reserve desync / pool liquidity drain

target_protocol_gate.context_mismatch_reason: live_context.json protocol.name is 'Morpho Midnight' (EVM non-custodial fixed-rate fixed-maturity lending protocol); blueprint protocol is 'Sable' (Liquity-style BNB-collateralized debt system). Core contracts listed in live_context.json are src/Midnight.sol, src/interfaces, src/libraries, src/periphery, src/ratifiers — none of which exist in the Sable repository. The live context was generated for a different protocol and cannot be used as live state for Sable.

rejection_reason: stale live context does not match active blueprint. live_context.json contains protocol.name='Morpho Midnight' with core contracts src/Midnight.sol, src/interfaces, src/libraries, src/periphery, src/ratifiers — a completely different protocol from the Sable blueprint (Liquity-style BNB CDP system with ActivePool, TroveManager, StabilityPool, BorrowerOperations, SableStakingV2, CommunityIssuance). No valid live state for Sable contracts exists in the repository. Additionally, the external report target (0x8665a78ccc84d6df2acaa4b207d88c6bc9b70ec5, wkeydao/USDT Pancake pair) is an AMM liquidity pool unrelated to the Sable protocol scope. No mapping from the external AMM reserve-desync primitive to a Sable fund-extraction or reward-extraction candidate can be established without valid live context. Per Live On-Chain Context Rules, verdict is REJECT.
